mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PRODUCT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO products ( product_id, is_active, product_name, product_type, min_period_month, max_period_month, min_amount, max_amount, target_large, target_detail, product_desc, interest_payment_type, applied_exchange_rate_type, created_at, created_by, approve_status, app_start_date, app_end_date, mkt_msg_top, mkt_msg_bottom, join_method, auto_transfer_svc, revolving_info, saving_method, payment_restriction, precautions, fx_cash_fee, auto_reinvestment, tax_benefit, payment_limit_info, data_access_right, illegal_contract_cancel, depositor_protection, rate_category )
VALUES ( #{product_id}, #{is_active}, #{product_name}, #{product_type}, #{min_period_month}, #{max_period_month}, #{min_amount}, #{max_amount}, #{target_large}, #{target_detail}, #{product_desc}, #{interest_payment_type}, #{applied_exchange_rate_type}, SYSDATE, #{created_by}, '검토중', #{app_start_date}, #{app_end_date}, #{mkt_msg_top}, #{mkt_msg_bottom}, #{join_method}, #{auto_transfer_svc}, #{revolving_info}, #{saving_method}, #{payment_restriction}, #{precautions}, #{fx_cash_fee}, #{auto_reinvestment}, #{tax_benefit}, #{payment_limit_info}, #{data_access_right}, #{illegal_contract_cancel}, #{depositor_protection}, #{rate_category} )

INSERT INTO product_requests ( request_id, product_id, requester_id, approver_id, request_status, request_type, rejection_reason, requested_at )
VALUES ( SEQ_REQUEST_ID.NEXTVAL, #{product_id}, #{created_by}, NULL, 'REQUESTED', 'CREATE', NULL, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT product_id, product_name, approve_status, created_at, created_by, is_active FROM products ORDER BY product_id DESC
SELECT product_id, product_name, approve_status, created_at, created_by, is_active FROM products WHERE approve_status = #{approve_status} ORDER BY product_id DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE products
product_name = #{product_name},
min_amount = #{min_amount},
max_amount = #{max_amount},
product_desc = #{product_desc},
mkt_msg_top = #{mkt_msg_top},
mkt_msg_bottom = #{mkt_msg_bottom},
join_method = #{join_method},
precautions = #{precautions},
tax_benefit = #{tax_benefit},
approve_status = #{approve_status},
updated_at = SYSDATE, updated_by = #{updated_by}
WHERE product_id = #{product_id}
